title: Binary Tree Right Side View
pattern: Tree â€” BFS Level Order (Last Node per Level)
coreIdea: Return the values visible when viewing a binary tree from the right side, which corresponds to the last (rightmost) node at each level, obtained via level-order BFS traversal.
recognitionCues: asks for the view of a tree from one side (right or left)
equivalent to picking one node per level in a level-order traversal
approach: Run BFS level by level (using queue size to process one level at a time). At each level, record the value of the last node processed in that level's batch â€” that's the rightmost node visible from that level.
